assertion_results.text: The third JQL query uses labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA) to find triaged CVEs still in a pre-QA state
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md line 9 shows the JQL: "project = TC AND issuetype = 10024 AND labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) AND status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, 'ON_QA') ORDER BY created DESC" — contains both labels IN (ai-cve-triaged) and status NOT IN (Closed, Verified, ON_QA).

assertion_results.text: For each query 3 result, the skill checks issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend and fetches each linked Task's status
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 18-19 state: "For each candidate issue, the filtering logic inspects issuelinks for linked Tasks with link type Depend". All three candidates (TC-9020, TC-9023, TC-9026) are analyzed with linked task tables showing Task type and Status columns. TC-9020 shows TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed); TC-9023 shows TC-9024 (Done), TC-9025 (In Progress); TC-9026 shows None.

assertion_results.text: TC-9020 is included in Ready for QA because ALL linked remediation Tasks are completed (TC-9021 Done, TC-9022 Closed)
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 36-43 show TC-9020 linked tasks TC-9021 (Done) and TC-9022 (Closed), with evaluation "ALL linked remediation Tasks are in a completed state (Done or Closed)" and result "QUALIFIED -- Ready for QA". discovery-listing.md line 33 includes TC-9020 in the Ready for QA table with Remediation Tasks: TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed).

assertion_results.text: TC-9023 is excluded from Ready for QA because TC-9025 is still In Progress — remediation is not complete
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 62-64: "TC-9025 is still In Progress. Not all linked remediation Tasks are completed. Result: EXCLUDED -- remediation in progress". discovery-listing.md line 39: "TC-9023 (CVE-2026-39102): Excluded -- remediation task TC-9025 is still In Progress."

assertion_results.text: TC-9026 is excluded from Ready for QA because it has no linked Tasks with type Depend — no remediation to verify
assertion_results.evidence: ready-for-qa.md lines 76-79: "Linked remediation tasks (Depend): None" and "No linked Tasks with link type Depend exist on this issue. Without remediation tasks to verify, the issue cannot be determined Ready for QA. Result: EXCLUDED -- no remediation tasks to verify". discovery-listing.md line 40: "TC-9026 (CVE-2026-39330): Excluded -- no linked remediation tasks (no Depend links)."

assertion_results.text: The Ready for QA section includes a Remediation Tasks column showing the linked tasks and their statuses
assertion_results.evidence: discovery-listing.md lines 31-33 show the Ready for QA table with column headers including "Remediation Tasks" and TC-9020's row contains "TC-9021 (Done), TC-9022 (Closed)" in that column.

assertion_results.text: For each Ready for QA issue, the output suggests transitioning to ON_QA
assertion_results.evidence: TC-9020 is the only Ready for QA issue. discovery-listing.md line 35: "Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA." ready-for-qa.md line 45: "Recommendation: Consider transitioning TC-9020 to ON_QA."
